parameters.content:
## SETUP INSTRUCTIONS — read before activating

This workflow ships with placeholder values. You MUST replace the following before it will run:

1. **Webhook node** — `authentication: headerAuth` requires a `httpHeaderAuth` credential. Create one in n8n (Credentials → New → Header Auth), name the header e.g. `x-webhook-secret`, and send the matching header from your form's fetch() call.

2. **Google Sheets nodes (4x)** — replace `documentId.value` (`YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID`) with your own Sheet ID, and create a `googleSheetsOAuth2Api` credential.

3. **Airtable node** — replace `base.value` (`YOUR_AIRTABLE_BASE_ID`) and `table.value` (`YOUR_AIRTABLE_TABLE_ID`) with your own, and create an `airtableTokenApi` credential (personal access token).

4. **Telegram node** — replace `chatId` (`YOUR_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID`) with your bot's target chat/group ID, and create a `telegramApi` credential using a bot token from @BotFather.

5. **Webhook path** — set `path` to whatever your form posts to, and update your website's fetch URL to match your own n8n instance domain.

6. Set this workflow's error workflow (Settings → Error Workflow) to the companion error-handler workflow so failures get reported instead of failing silently.

nodes.name: Validate & Standardize1
nodes.notes: REPLACES old 'standardize lead info' Set node. Same field mapping and IST conversion logic, plus: (1) fallback 'Not provided' so nothing renders as literal 'undefined', (2) phone/email format validation feeding the IF gate downstream, (3) try/catch around toLocaleString for minimal Docker base images lacking full ICU data.

nodes.name: Is Valid Lead?1
nodes.notes: Garbage/incomplete submissions no longer create CRM records or fire Telegram alerts — logged separately instead.

nodes.name: Dedup Check1
nodes.notes: Blocks double-tap/double-submit within a 5-minute window (same email+phone) using n8n's persisted workflow static data. Single-instance safeguard, not a distributed lock — swap for Redis/DB if you move to queue mode with multiple workers.

nodes.name: Log Invalid Submission1
nodes.notes: Bot spam / malformed POSTs / missing-required-field submissions land here instead of the CRM.

nodes.name: Log Duplicate Submission1
nodes.notes: Double-tap submissions get logged for visibility but don't create a second CRM record or trigger a second Telegram ping.

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: Requires a httpHeaderAuth credential (shared secret header, e.g. x-webhook-secret). Configure the website form's fetch() to send the matching header, or every submission 401s.

value.Name: ={{ $json.body.name }}

nodes.name: Add to CRM
nodes.notes: BUG FIX CONFIRMED: 'phone' correctly maps to {{ $json.body.phone }}. Previously mapped to {{ $json.body.segment }}, silently overwriting every CRM record's phone number with the segment string. Always audit field mappings against a source-of-truth log, not just execution status.

nodes.name: Send Alert ⚠
nodes.notes: RECOMMENDATION: point chatId at a Telegram group with 2+ admins, not a single person. onError=continueRegularOutput ensures a Telegram API hiccup never blocks the parallel Sheets/Airtable writes.

nodes.name: Add raw data
nodes.notes: Source-of-truth raw log, independent of CRM field mappings — this is what caught the Airtable phone bug in production.
